phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'imbarco per il traghetto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lim-BAR-koh per eel trah-GET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the central dock, straight ahead.

responses.english: At the central dock, straight ahead.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora torna l'ultimo barco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah TOR-nah loo-LEE-moh BAR-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un biglietto giornaliero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah oon bee-LYET-toh jor-na-lee-EH-ro, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si può nuotare qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see pwoh nwoh-TAH-reh kwee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si arriva a Sirmione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KOH-meh see ah-REE-vah ah seer-MYOH-neh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Prenda l'autobus alla stazione di Verona Porta Nuova.
likely_response.pronunciation: PREHN-dah l'ah-oo-TOH-boos AHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh DEE veh-ROH-nah POHR-tah noo-OH-vah
likely_response.translation_en: Take the bus at Verona Porta Nuova station.

responses.english: Take the bus at Verona Porta Nuova station.
responses.phonetic: PREHN-dah l'ah-oo-TOH-boos AHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh DEE veh-ROH-nah POHR-tah noo-OH-vah
responses.local: Prenda l'autobus alla stazione di Verona Porta Nuova.
